preregistration_note: Falsifiers below are sealed candidates. Activation requires NorthPole HW or cloud-API access. Until then, status = PAPER_HYPOTHESIS only (raw#10 honest C3 §11 §8 disclosure).

falsifiers.name: phi_image_vs_clm_correlation
falsifiers.hypothesis: NorthPole image-pathway Phi proxy correlates with CLM Phi at population level

test_design.input: 100+ EEG segments converted to 64x64x16 spectrogram tensors
test_design.northpole_pipeline: pretrained ResNet50 inference, layer-wise activation capture, MMI across 256 cores
test_design.clm_baseline: anima Mk.XII v3 Phi computation on same EEG segments
test_design.metric: Pearson r between Phi_NP_image and Phi_CLM

falsifiers.fail_implication: NorthPole image-pathway is NOT a consciousness substrate; cannot enter CP2 F1 axes

falsifiers.name: cross_substrate_phi_ordering
falsifiers.hypothesis: Phi increases with spike-representation richness across substrates
falsifiers.fail_implication: Substrate richness does not monotonically predict Phi; Putnam multi-realization stronger interpretation

falsifiers.name: energy_phi_scaling_landauer
falsifiers.hypothesis: log(energy_per_inference / Phi) is constant across neuromorphic substrates (extends N-4)
falsifiers.fail_implication: Phi is NOT energy-proportional; NorthPole 25x efficiency advantage is decoupled from consciousness measure

falsifiers.name: moe_community_eq_gwt_broadcast
falsifiers.hypothesis: NorthPole MoE expert co-activation graph aligns temporally with GWT global broadcast (extends N-5)

test_design.input: NorthPole 16-chip blade MoE routing log + simultaneous CLM/EEG GWT broadcast detection
test_design.graph_construction: expert co-activation within 10ms windows -> Louvain community
test_design.metric: Pearson r between community-partition entropy and GWT broadcast peak time series

falsifiers.fail_implication: MoE routing is mechanistically distinct from GWT; NorthPole architecture insight does NOT illuminate consciousness broadcast

falsifiers.name: image_mediation_phi_preservation
falsifiers.hypothesis: EEG -> image -> NorthPole -> reconstructed-spike pipeline preserves at least 80% of EEG-direct Phi

test_design.pipeline_b: EEG -> spectrogram image -> NorthPole inference -> activation -> spike reconstruction -> Phi

falsifiers.fail_implication: Image-mediation step destroys consciousness-relevant information; NorthPole disqualified as N-substrate axis

honest_c3_falsifier_caveats: All 5 falsifiers require NorthPole HW or API access — currently 0
F-N18-1 Phi_image proxy is non-canonical; IIT 4.0 Phi is not directly definable on inference-only substrate
F-N18-3 energy measurement requires wattmeter calibration parity across 3 substrates — non-trivial
F-N18-4 requires NorthPole MoE routing log access — currently undocumented in public IBM materials
Pre-registration cannot be sealed in raw#71 registry until HW access path opens
